user_query: I'm planning a hiking trip and I need to gather information about the weather conditions and terrain of the hiking trails. Fetch webcams with live streams and webcams that are featured by the editors. Also, provide me with a map tile with English labels to help me visualize the hiking trails.

TaskList.description: Fetch current weather conditions for the hiking trails area.
Gather information about the terrain of the hiking trails.
Fetch webcams that provide live streams for the hiking trails area.
Fetch featured webcams selected by editors for the hiking trails area.
Provide a map tile with English labels to visualize the hiking trails.
